name: E Fund Management Co. - Innovates Closed Hybrid 18m Cny Fund
summary: E Fund Management Co. - Innovates Closed Hybrid 18m Cny Fund is a hybrid fund managed by E Fund Management that invests in a mix of stocks and bonds with a closed-end structure for 18 months and is denominated in Chinese Yuan (CNY). The fund aims to achieve capital appreciation while managing risk through diversification and a strategic investment approach.
